mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_key = #{permissionKey} AND deleted = 0
SELECT p.* FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND rp.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND rp.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_key FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND rp.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0
